case_title: WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. BULMARO ALVAREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-30-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BULMARO ALVAREZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. ROBERT SMITH APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. MANTI HENRIQUEZ, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, PRESENT AND ASSISTED DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MINI MINUTES: JPT; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff West Coast Property Management is present. Represented by George Johnson.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Bulmaro Alvarez is present.
Spanish Court Interpreter Kenneth Wright is present to assist the defendant.
Attorney Robert Smith appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of SEP-14-2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
